title: FSM-shaped coverage incl. guard MC-DC
manager: Coverage metrics shaped for state machines — state, transition, path, and guard MC-DC (modified condition/decision coverage) — plus standard vacuity checks, so "is this machine well-tested" has an answer tuned to the way machines actually fail. Guard MC-DC in particular catches the boolean-condition gaps that line coverage misses entirely, which is exactly where guard bugs like to hide from an ordinary test suite.
cs: state/transition/path coverage + guard MC-DC; vacuity checks standard; FSM-shaped rather than line-shaped; measures machine test adequacy.
